html:
Exclusive to:

For the Shipwrecked equivalent, see Wobster Den.

The Wobster Mound are naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are present in Coastal Ocean close to the shore of the main continent.

Wobster Mound spawns a Wobster every 2 minutes during Dusk and Night, for up to 2 Wobsters. When killed they regenerate in 90 seconds.

The Wobster Mound can be mined for 3 Rocks plus a 50% chance of one extra, 2 Wobsters plus a 50% of one extra, and releasing all the inhabiting Wobsters (up to 2).

Trivia

  • The Wobster Mound was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

–Woodie

–Warly

–Wormwood
“Anyone home?”

“Even crustaceans need a place to sleep now and den.”
–Wortox

–Wurt
“That's where the Wobsters make camp.”
–Walter
“Something's peering out from inside...”
–Wanda
The Wobster Mound are naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are present in Coastal Ocean close to the shore of the main continent.
Wobster Mound spawns a Wobster every 2 minutes during Dusk and Night, for up to 2 Wobsters. When killed they regenerate in 90 seconds.
The Wobster Mound can be mined for 3 Rocks plus a 50% chance of one extra, 2 Wobsters plus a 50% of one extra, and releasing all the inhabiting Wobsters (up to 2).
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Wobster Mound was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.

The '''Wobster Mound''' are naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. They are present in [[Ocean#Coastal|Coastal Ocean]] close to the shore of the main continent.

Wobster Mound spawns a [[Wobster#Don't Starve Together|Wobster]] every 2 minutes during [[Dusk]] and [[Night]], for up to 2 Wobsters. When killed they regenerate in 90 seconds.

The Wobster Mound can be mined for 3 [[Rocks]] plus a 50% chance of one extra, 2 Wobsters plus a 50% of one extra, and releasing all the inhabiting Wobsters (up to 2).

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Wobster Mound was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#She Sells Sea Shells|She Sells Sea Shells]]'' update.
